hooks.command: f=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if printf '%s\n' "$f" | grep -q '^sb-00/' && ! printf '%s\n' "$f" | grep -qx 'sb-00/lib/version.ts'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Version check: staged changes touch sb-00/ but sb-00/lib/version.ts is not bumped. If this commit develops the app further, bump APP_VERSION in sb-00/lib/version.ts before committing (CLAUDE.md repo hygiene)."}}'; fi; true
